title: Agora Seeks US Bank Charter to Scale Digital Dollars
message_html: Agora Seeks US Bank Charter to Scale Digital Dollars ...
snippet: Stablecoin issuer Agora Finance has filed for a national trust bank charter as it looks to build its business in the United States. The company filed its application for Agora National Trust Bank with the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC), Agora CEO and Co-founder Nick van Eck wrote in
